actors: Lemogang Tsipa, Thabo Rametsi, Thabiso Masoti
plot: A tale of love, loyalty and above all the true meaning of power, Amandla portrays the tragedy of two inseparable brothers impelled to war each other. Violently orphaned at a tender age, their lives assume entirely different directions: the oldest falls into a life of crime to ensure their livelihood while the youngest pursues justice as a policeman. When a savage crime drives the final wedge between them, brotherly love is put to a heart-wrenching test and the lies of their childhood are finally exposed. But through self-sacrifice their inviolable bond triumphs over their inner demons and malevolent external forces alike.
